extortion.description: [AI generated] Covestro is a global provider of high-performance materials including polycarbonates, polyurethanes, raw materials for coatings, adhesives and specialty chemicals. It is among the world‘s largest polymer companies and primarily serves the automotive, construction, wood processing and furniture, electrical and electronics segments, and also the industries such fields as sports and leisure. Its products help make everyday products lighter, safer, and more energy efficient.
